title: Jobs-To-Be-Done
description: The job a buyer persona hires a solution to do

job_statement.description: Core job statement: 'When [situation], I want to [motivation], so I can [expected outcome]'

functional_job.description: The practical task they need to accomplish

emotional_job.description: How they want to feel (e.g., confident, in control, innovative)

social_job.description: How they want to be perceived by others

current_solution.description: How they currently get this job done

constraints.description: Limitations that affect how they can get the job done

success_criteria.description: How they measure whether the job is done well

underserved_outcomes.description: Outcomes where current solutions fall short — your opportunity
